questions.question: What is Deku's real name?
questions.explanation: Deku's real name is Izuku Midoriya. 'Deku' was originally a mocking nickname given by Bakugo, which Midoriya later adopts as his hero name.

questions.question: What is the name of the legendary Quirk passed down to Deku by All Might?
questions.explanation: One For All is a transferable Quirk that accumulates physical strength and allows the user to share it.

questions.question: Who is Deku's explosive childhood rival and classmate?
questions.explanation: Katsuki Bakugo is Deku's aggressive childhood rival who possesses the Explosion Quirk.

questions.question: What two elements does Shoto Todoroki control with his Half-Cold Half-Hot Quirk?
questions.explanation: Todoroki can generate ice from the right side of his body and fire from the left side.

questions.question: Who is the leader of the League of Villains, known for the hands covering his face and body?
questions.explanation: Tomura Shigaraki (Tenko Shimura) leads the League of Villains and has the Decay Quirk.
